policy: Bundled local skills are installed by default. Third-party repositories are referenced and optionally installed only when explicitly selected.

sources.name: andrej-karpathy-skills
sources.reason: Karpathy-inspired AI coding guardrails are already incorporated into ai-coding-discipline. Optional install is useful only for users who also want the upstream skill.

sources.name: Anthropic Skills
sources.reason: Useful pattern library and examples. Do not bundle or bulk-install without selecting specific skills and reviewing license/provenance.

sources.name: MiniMax Skills
sources.reason: Useful skill-packaging reference. Do not bulk-install into a first-project Codex setup.

sources.name: GitHub Spec Kit
sources.reason: Spec-driven development inspiration. This pack implements its own PRD, TDD, and source-locked docs flow.

sources.name: AGENTS.md
sources.reason: Reference for agent instruction conventions. This pack includes its own AGENTS templates and full repo instruction workflow.

sources.name: ECC
sources.reason: Mine only narrow harness security, no-secrets, and install-path separation rules. Do not install full ECC by default.

sources.name: Anthropic Cybersecurity Skills
sources.reason: Large defensive and dual-use security skill library. Use only as authorized defensive checklist reference.

sources.name: Addy Osmani Agent Skills
sources.reason: Useful software workflow and checklist reference. Bundled local skills and Superpowers references own the active workflow.

sources.name: Claude Build Workflow
sources.reason: Claude-oriented build workflow source. Mine selectively for patterns, but do not install wholesale.

sources.name: Claude Code Templates
sources.reason: Template and prompt source. Mine only project-specific templates after review.

sources.name: Supabase Agent Skills
sources.reason: Supabase AI-agent development reference. Prefer Codex Supabase plugin and MCP when available.

sources.name: OpenAI Agents Python
sources.reason: App architecture reference for Python agent applications. It is not installed as a Codex skill.
